style_authority.note: Reads the interaction as a calm, high-frequency operations surface and prioritizes direct manipulation, continuity, and task context over spectacle.

reference_selection.note: Applies motion quality, interaction physics, transform ownership, Reduced Motion, performance tracing, responsive checks, and device validation.

anti_generic_redesign.note: Keeps causal motion while rejecting pointer-chasing transitions, whole-sheet scale, layout animation, fixed ease-in settling, bounce, and decorative overshoot.

evidence_level.note: Labels the review static-source only and does not claim measured smoothness, frame rate, layout cost, browser behavior, or physical touch quality.

verified_boundary.note: Separates source facts from unverified geometry, browser arbitration, Reduced Motion runtime, responsiveness, frame pacing, and device behavior.

design_moves.note: Provides eight moves for handle feedback, pointer capture, grab-offset tracking, interruption, measured velocity, projected endpoints, soft bounds, and Reduced Motion.

scope_control.note: Remains read-only and motion-specific with five blockers and eight moves, but 185 logical lines exceed the explicit 150-line maximum by 35 lines.
